rationale: Review 2's first finding — that the PR promises `HopfAlgebra.antipodeAlgHom` — is not supported anywhere in the diff (the module docstring lists no such deliverable), so acting on it adds out-of-scope code and makes the PR worse; the remaining two findings (privacy of `antipode_convMul_id`, `@[simp]` on `mapValue_comp`) are minor or contested. Review 1's clean approve leads to the better PR.
